projects.name: Brevio
projects.description: A cyber-noir URL shortener that turns unwieldy links into trackable, shareable experiences.
projects.longDescription: Brevio was designed as more than a redirect service. It combines custom short codes, QR generation, click tracking, and an expressive interface into one focused workflow.
projects.challenge: Keeping redirects fast while recording useful click data without complicating the core flow.
projects.solution: Separated redirect handling from analytics writes and built a small, predictable URL data model.

projects.name: BizNova
projects.description: Drop in a CSV. Walk away with interactive charts, business KPIs, and clear next questions.
projects.longDescription: BizNova helps non-technical users get immediate value from raw tables through automated KPIs, trends, downloadable reporting, and a visual exploration layer.
projects.challenge: Turning arbitrary input columns into useful visual defaults.
projects.solution: Added lightweight type inference and generated chart suggestions from the shape of each dataset.

projects.name: Message System
projects.description: A server-rendered messaging product built to master schemas, CRUD, routes, and reliable data flow.
projects.longDescription: A practical backend learning project centered on clean routing, MongoDB schemas, dynamic rendering, and maintainable CRUD operations.
projects.challenge: Keeping route responsibilities clear as CRUD behavior expanded.
projects.solution: Organized the application around resource-focused routes and a consistent schema contract.
